name: @tank/github-issues
description: GitHub Issues expert via gh CLI. Full issue lifecycle, templates/forms (.yml/.md), search, labels/milestones/Projects v2, gh api scripting, bulk ops, Actions automation, issue-driven development. Triggers: github issue, gh issue, issue template, issue form, create issue, close issue, triage, label, milestone, stale issues, bulk close, search issues, ISSUE_TEMPLATE, config.yml, issue-driven development, gh search issues, gh label, sub-issues, gh issue develop.
